_comment: Focus-zone keys for the agent's data-dir settings.json. Defaults 0/0 = legacy count-based behaviour, byte-identical. Enable as a SECOND step. Metric is days + count, never tokens.

_meaning.CLAUDE_MEM_CONTEXT_ZONE_A_HOURS: observations younger than N hours render FULL. 0 = legacy.
_meaning.CLAUDE_MEM_CONTEXT_TRAIL_DAYS: observations older than N days are NOT loaded (search on demand). 0 = no cutoff.
_meaning.CLAUDE_MEM_CONTEXT_FULL_COUNT: cap on full renders in the desk zone.

_rollback: Set the two zone keys back to '0'. Keep a settings backup before editing.
_restart_trap: Restart the worker after editing. Its pid file is JSON, not a bare pid.
